onboarding.slide1Subtitle: Place your predictions on real games across 6 sports. No money, just skill.

onboarding.slide3Subtitle: See how you stack up against the world. One app, six sports, one leaderboard.

coinStore.title: COIN STORE
coinStore.buyCoinsDesc: Coins are used to enter prediction leagues and redeem rewards
coinStore.comingSoonDesc: In-app purchases will be available once the app is published on the App Store.
coinStore.purchaseSuccessDesc: Your coins will be credited shortly.
coinStore.purchaseFailedDesc: Something went wrong. Please try again.
coinStore.proDesc: Unlock unlimited predictions, all sports, and get 50 coins every month
coinStore.subscribedDesc: Welcome to Kinetic Pro! You will receive monthly coins.
coinStore.proMonthlyDesc: Full access to all features, billed monthly
coinStore.proActiveMember: You are a Kinetic Pro member. 50 coins are credited monthly.
coinStore.disclaimer: Kinetic is a skill-based prediction game for entertainment purposes. Coins are virtual credits with no cash value. All purchases are processed by the App Store and are subject to their terms. Not a gambling service.
